hc6c42840gac59g437cg8e65gf87cefba223a: Spiders are down there, boss. Lovely spiders. Keep 'em real clean, we do.
h43c1a2c0gbca4g4a86g80ceg94ae6713840f: Unless you like big, bristlin' hairy legs, I wouldn't go down there, mate. Tha's the spider pit.
h2739c028g6c5dg45d3g9fdbg4133bf7e3f44: If you're headin' down to the spiders, give 'em a tickle. They're real friendly...
